metadata.description: WorkBoard — live project kanban for Claude Code, distributed as a plugin.

plugins.name: board-steward
plugins.description: Live project kanban for Claude Code. Auto-tracks shipped / fixed / deferred work as cards on a board.json + live HTML board (127.0.0.1:7891), survives sessions via a SessionStart digest, auto-links edited files to their cards, and backstops un-carded work on Stop. Bootstraps a fresh board by mining past session history.
